title: Talkin' Body (Tove Lo Cover)
lyrics: Hey, hey, bed stay in bed, the feeling of your skin locked in my head, smoke, smoke me broke, I don't care, I'm down for what you want, hey, day drunk into the night, I wanna keep you here, could you dry my tears, yeah, summer lovin' and fights, how it is for us, and it's all because, and now if we're talkin' bodies, you got a perfect one so put it on me, swear it won't take me long, if
